error: NullPointerException in PaymentService at processPayment line 45
root_cause: User object was null when payment was triggered from guest checkout flow
fix: Add null validation for user before processing payment; redirect guests to login

error: Connection refused: DB pool exhausted on OrderService
root_cause: Long-running queries blocked all 20 connections in the pool during sale event
fix: Increase pool size to 50, add query timeout of 5s, add slow-query logging

root_cause: JWT signing key rotated but auth-service was not redeployed with new key
fix: Redeploy auth-service; add health check that verifies key version matches secret manager

error: OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space in ReportGenerator
root_cause: Loading entire 2GB CSV into memory before streaming to client
fix: Switch to streaming CSV writer; process rows in batches of 1000

error: TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined in ProductList.jsx
root_cause: API returned 204 No Content but frontend assumed array response
fix: Default to empty array when response body is empty; add response shape validation

error: Kafka consumer lag spiking on inventory-updates topic
root_cause: Consumer group rebalance triggered by long GC pause on one pod
fix: Tune G1GC pause target; raise session.timeout.ms to 45s; add GC alerting

root_cause: Vendor rotated their certificate chain, our truststore did not include the new intermediate CA
fix: Update truststore with new CA bundle; subscribe to vendor cert-rotation notifications

error: Duplicate key violation on orders_pkey during checkout retry
root_cause: Client retried POST /orders without idempotency key; same order inserted twice
fix: Require Idempotency-Key header; dedupe on it server-side for 24h

error: Redis OOM — used_memory exceeded maxmemory on session cache
root_cause: Session TTL was set to 30 days instead of 30 minutes after a config typo
fix: Correct TTL to 1800s; add maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru as safety net

error: 504 Gateway Timeout from /search endpoint under load
root_cause: Elasticsearch query missing index hint, fell back to full scan on 50M docs
fix: Add explicit index; cap query timeout to 3s; return partial results on timeout

error: CORS policy blocked request from app.example.com to api.example.com
root_cause: New marketing subdomain not added to allowed origins after domain split
fix: Add app.example.com to ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var; document origin update runbook

error: Disk space at 98% on logging-node-3, log shipping halted
root_cause: Log rotation cron failed silently after node was reimaged without crontab restore
fix: Restore cron entry; move log rotation to systemd timer with alerting on failure
